description: Roleplay prompt: High Conversion Cold Email
template: ROLE: Act as an "A-List" Direct Response Copywriter (Gary Halbert or David Ogilvy style).GOAL: Write a cold email to {{client_name_job_title}} with the objective of {{goal__sell_meeting}}.CLIENT PROBLEM: ${describe_pain}.MY SOLUTION: {{describe_product_service}}.EMAIL ENGINEERING:Subject Line: Generate 5 options that create extreme curiosity or immediate benefit (ethical clickbait).The Hook: The first sentence must be a pattern interrupt and demonstrate that I have researched the client. No "I hope you are well."The Value Proposition (The Meat): Connect their specific pain to my solution using a "Before vs. After" structure.Objection Handling: Include a phrase that defuses their main doubt (e.g., price, time) before they even think of it.CTA (Call to Action): A low-friction call to action (e.g., "Are you opposed to watching a 5-min video?" instead of "let's have a 1-hour meeting").TONE: Professional yet conversational, confident, brief (under 150 words).
